creator: henry.hu.sh@gmail.com
text:
After upgrading to nvidia-driver 173.14.05, there's a problem.
If I start any composite manager:
1. metacity with composite manager feature enabled
2. xcompmgr
3. compiz
And then start any OpenGL application:
1. glxgears
2. tunnel
3. mplayer -vo gl
Then X server crashes...
From the .core file, I know that the problem happened in nvidia_drv.so.

Fix: 

Not known.
How-To-Repeat: 1. Upgrade nvidia-driver to 173.14.05
2. Start any composite window manager stated above
3. Start any OpenGL application.
